local_env_policy..env: local development only; must remain gitignored; must not be deployed or committed
local_env_policy..env.local: local development only; must remain gitignored
local_env_policy..env.production: do not store in repo; production host secret manager only
local_env_policy..env.production.local: do not store in repo; production host secret manager only

phase1_completion_requires: remaining findings limited to local .env or approved legacy placeholders
